tiers.name: Community Entry
tiers.purpose: Free entry that builds trust and shows practical value.
tiers.conversion_goal: Turn active builders into qualified sales opportunities

tiers.name: Design-Partner Pilot
tiers.purpose: Validate the use case, collect product feedback, and prove business value.
tiers.conversion_goal: Turn validated pilots into annual contracts

tiers.name: Production Annual Contract
tiers.purpose: Turn validated pilot workflows into repeatable annual revenue.
tiers.conversion_goal: Drive renewals, expansion, and customer references

tiers.name: Strategic Enterprise
tiers.purpose: Support larger deployments with security, governance, compliance, private environment, SSO, or deeper field-engineering requirements.
tiers.conversion_goal: Support larger opportunities after pilots and annual contracts are validated

notes: Pricing ranges are assumptions for planning and should be validated per segment.
Enterprise agreements may include security and compliance add-ons.
